meta.title: Realtime Chat
meta.description: Landing page for a fast, secure, and collaborative realtime chat platform.

home.headline: Move your team conversations from chaos to clarity.
home.description: Create rooms, reply instantly, and keep every decision searchable in one modern chat workspace.
home.socialProof: Trusted by product, support, and engineering teams across 20+ countries.
home.trustTitle: Built for teams that move fast
home.featureOneDesc: Keep discussions structured with channels and replies that update in real time.
home.featureTwoDesc: Know who is online, who is typing, and where your team is focused right now.
home.featureThreeDesc: Find past decisions, links, and files in seconds with reliable message indexing.
home.testimonialQuote: Our response time dropped by 37% in two weeks after we moved all operational chat into this platform.
home.testimonialAuthor: Dina Walker, Ops Lead at Orbit Labs
home.finalCtaTitle: Built to be free, built to be useful.
home.finalCtaDesc: This platform is 100% free for all teams. Create your workspace, invite members, and collaborate in real time without paywalls.
home.freeForever: No trial limits. No hidden plans. No billing setup.
